transcription.text: Soap? Nope. When you discover the cleaner, feeling obsessed, you're gonna be feeling your best. Zest is different from soap. In water, you can see the tacky film soap leaves even after rinsing. Zest doesn't. The odorant zest is specially made to rinse without leaving sticky film. Nothing comes between me and feeling so clean. I feel my best. Discover the cleaner, feeling obsessed, you're gonna be feeling your best. I'm feeling my best.
